notes:
# FileLens v1.1.4

## 中文

### 🚨 关键修复

**老用户升级后看不到 workspace 的问题** —— 某个早期版本把 SwiftData 从单一
`default.store` 拆成 `catalog.sqlite` + `workspaces/<uuid>.sqlite` 两层架构,
但**没写迁移代码**。所有从那个版本之前升上来的用户启动后会看到 sidebar
是空的,以为数据丢了。

**本版本启动时自动一次性迁移**:
- 把 `default.store` 里的 workspace / 规则 / 条件全量复制到 `catalog.sqlite`
- 老的 `default.store` 重命名为 `default.store.legacy` 作为安全备份永久保留
- 文件索引数据(具体每个文件)不迁移,FSEvents 自动重扫文件夹生成,几秒
  内完成。**所有规则分类、文件夹设置、显示名、bookmark 权限——完整保留**

**如果你升级到 1.1.3 之后看到空的 sidebar**:升到 1.1.4 启动一次,数据会
自动回来。原始 `default.store` 始终没被删,只是改名,绝对没丢。

---

## English

### 🚨 Critical Fix

**Lost-workspaces-on-upgrade bug** — an earlier version split SwiftData
storage from a single `default.store` into a two-tier `catalog.sqlite` +
`workspaces/<uuid>.sqlite` layout, **without shipping migration code**.
Users upgrading from before that split would launch the new app and see
an empty sidebar, thinking their data was gone.

**This version runs a one-time migration on launch**:
- Copies all workspaces / rules / conditions from `default.store` into
  `catalog.sqlite`
- Renames the old `default.store` to `default.store.legacy` as a permanent
  safety backup
- File index data (per-file rows) is not migrated; FSEvents will rescan
  folders automatically within seconds. **All rule classifications, folder
  settings, display names, and bookmark permissions are preserved.**

**If your sidebar went empty after upgrading to 1.1.3**: just upgrade to
1.1.4 and launch once — your data will come back. The original
`default.store` was never deleted, only renamed.
